name: python3-pymetasploit3
title: python3-pymetasploit3
description:
full-fledged Metasploit automation library (Python 3)
This package contains a full-fledged Python3 Metasploit automation library. It
can interact with Metasploit either through msfrpcd or the msgrpc plugin in
msfconsole.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pymsfconsole.py because full-fledged Metasploit automation library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pymsfconsole.py as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pymsfconsole.py [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pymsfconsole.py.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pymsfconsole.py with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pymsfconsole.py --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
